triggers.name: trg_increment_diary_count_on_insert
triggers.comment: Incrementa contador de entradas al insertar

triggers.name: trg_decrement_diary_count_on_delete
triggers.comment: Decrementa contador de entradas al eliminar

triggers.name: trg_increment_question_count_on_insert
triggers.comment: Incrementa contador de preguntas al insertar

triggers.name: trg_decrement_question_count_on_delete
triggers.comment: Decrementa contador de preguntas al eliminar

functions.body: BEGIN NEW.updated_at = now(); RETURN NEW; END;
functions.name: set_updated_at
functions.comment: Función estándar para actualizar timestamp en UPDATE

functions.body: BEGIN IF TG_OP = 'INSERT' THEN UPDATE medical_cases SET diary_entry_count = diary_entry_count + 1, last_diary_entry_at = NEW.created_at, last_diary_health_status = NEW.health_status WHERE id = NEW.case_id AND deleted_at IS NULL; ELSIF TG_OP = 'DELETE' THEN UPDATE medical_cases SET diary_entry_count = diary_entry_count - 1 WHERE id = OLD.case_id AND deleted_at IS NULL; END IF; RETURN NEW; END;
functions.name: increment_case_diary_count
functions.comment: Mantiene el contador de entradas del diario desnormalizado en medical_cases

functions.body: BEGIN IF TG_OP = 'INSERT' THEN UPDATE medical_cases SET question_count = question_count + 1 WHERE id = NEW.case_id AND deleted_at IS NULL; ELSIF TG_OP = 'DELETE' THEN UPDATE medical_cases SET question_count = question_count - 1 WHERE id = OLD.case_id AND deleted_at IS NULL; END IF; RETURN NEW; END;
functions.name: increment_case_question_count
functions.comment: Mantiene el contador de preguntas desnormalizado en medical_cases

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Listar casos del usuario ordenados por fecha (historial)
kpi_design_notes.detail: Índice compuesto en (user_id, consultation_date) para acceso rápido sin necesidad de agregación.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT cases WHERE user_id = X AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY consultation_date DESC

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Ver últimas actualizaciones del usuario (última entrada diario, últimas preguntas)
kpi_design_notes.detail: mv_user_case_summary desnormaliza totales por usuario: total_cases, active_cases, last_activity. Permite dashboard rápido sin JOINs costosos.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT user con COUNT(cases), COUNT(diary entries), MAX(dates)

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Actividad de cada caso (entradas diario, preguntas, días transcurridos)
kpi_design_notes.detail: mv_case_activity proporciona por cada caso: diary_entry_count, question_count, last_diary_entry_at, days_since_consultation. Evita aggregations en cada vista de caso.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT case with COUNT(diary), COUNT(questions), datediff, last activities

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Contar entradas del diario por caso (para mostrar en historial)
kpi_design_notes.detail: Columna diary_entry_count en medical_cases, actualizada por trigger increment_case_diary_count. Evita COUNT(*) en cada lista de casos.

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Contar preguntas por caso (para mostrar actividad)
kpi_design_notes.detail: Columna question_count en medical_cases, actualizada por trigger increment_case_question_count. Evita COUNT(*) costoso.

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Última entrada del diario de un caso (para mostrar en tarjeta de historial)
kpi_design_notes.detail: Columnas last_diary_entry_at y last_diary_health_status en medical_cases, actualizadas por trigger. Evita subquery en lista.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT MAX(created_at) and last health_status WHERE case_id = X

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Casos activos vs completados por usuario
kpi_design_notes.detail: mv_user_case_summary incluye active_cases. Permite dashboard de estado sin aggregation en tiempo real.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT COUNT(*) WHERE user_id = X GROUP BY status

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Notificaciones de seguimiento: qué usuarios necesitan una actualización hoy
kpi_design_notes.detail: Índice en (user_id, status) y columnas de timestamp en medical_cases. Job cron puede buscar casos donde (NOW() - last_diary_entry_at) > interval sin necesidad de tabla especial.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT users WHERE tiene cases sin actualizar en X días

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Buscar dentro de explicaciones guardadas (análisis de IA)
kpi_design_notes.detail: Índice GIN en analysis_result (JSONB). Permite full-text search en los bloques explicativos sin tabla adicional.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT cases WHERE analysis_result JSONB contains keyword

kpi_design_notes.kpi: Auditoría de uso de API (tokens, costos, errores)
kpi_design_notes.detail: Tabla api_logs con índices en (created_at, request_type). Un job de reporting puede agregarlo diariamente sin materialized view porque son logs de baja cardinalidad.
kpi_design_notes.query_pattern: SELECT SUM(tokens), COUNT(errors) GROUP BY date, request_type

materialized_views.name: mv_user_case_summary
materialized_views.query: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, COUNT(DISTINCT mc.id) AS total_cases, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mc.status = 'en_tratamiento' THEN mc.id END) AS active_cases, MAX(mc.updated_at) AS last_case_update, MAX(de.created_at) AS last_diary_entry, COUNT(DISTINCT de.id) AS total_diary_entries FROM users u LEFT JOIN medical_cases mc ON u.id = mc.user_id AND mc.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN diary_entries de ON mc.id = de.case_id AND de.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY u.id, u.email
materialized_views.description: Resumen por usuario: cantidad de casos, últimas actividades, estado general.

materialized_views.name: mv_case_activity
materialized_views.query: SELECT mc.id AS case_id, mc.user_id, mc.diagnosis, mc.consultation_date, mc.status, mc.current_health_status, COUNT(DISTINCT de.id) AS diary_entry_count, COUNT(DISTINCT cq.id) AS question_count, MAX(de.created_at) AS last_diary_entry_at, MAX(cq.created_at) AS last_question_at, CURRENT_DATE - mc.consultation_date AS days_since_consultation FROM medical_cases mc LEFT JOIN diary_entries de ON mc.id = de.case_id AND de.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN case_questions cq ON mc.id = cq.case_id AND cq.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE mc.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY mc.id, mc.user_id, mc.diagnosis, mc.consultation_date, mc.status, mc.current_health_status
materialized_views.description: Actividad por caso: última entrada diario, cantidad de preguntas, días transcurridos.
